reforms.description: A new incentive regime was launched in mid-2003 to foster capital formation, including through targeted tax breaks, aimed at improving the business climate and encouraging investment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The targeted tax breaks are designed to stimulate private investment, which can enhance productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The new incentive regime was launched in mid-2003.
reforms.importance_rationale: The introduction of targeted tax breaks represents a significant change in the approach to fostering investment, although it is part of a broader programme.
reforms.source_quote: A new incentive regime was launched in mid-2003 to foster capital formation, including through targeted tax breaks.

reforms.description: The reform of the Bankruptcy Law has been approved and is expected to facilitate the restructuring of businesses in trouble, which is crucial for improving the overall business environment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enabling more efficient restructuring of failing businesses, the reform can enhance resource allocation and productivity in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform of the Bankruptcy Law has been approved.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform addresses a critical aspect of the business environment, although it is part of a broader set of reforms.
reforms.source_quote: The reform of the Bankruptcy Law, which was urgently needed, has been approved and should now be speedily implemented.

reforms.description: A new tax reserve instrument was introduced to support investment and innovation in enterprises producing tradable goods and services, requiring firms to use the allocated funds within two years for initial investments or innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Encourages firms to invest in innovation and modernization, potentially enhancing productivity and competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: The tax reserve instrument was established as part of the investment support framework.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform introduces a new mechanism to incentivize investment in innovation, which is significant for enhancing the business environment.
reforms.source_quote: The main financial instrument for investment support...provides support subject to results: the firm keeps the financial support only if it proves profitable.

reforms.description: Portugal's venture capital market has been identified as underdeveloped, with efforts underway to channel more investment into early-stage companies, particularly in high-technology sectors.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing venture capital availability can stimulate innovation and support the growth of new firms, contributing to economic dynamism.
reforms.status_evidence: Efforts are underway to improve the venture capital market for early-stage companies.
reforms.importance_rationale: Addressing the underdevelopment of the venture capital market is crucial for fostering innovation and supporting startups.
reforms.source_quote: Venture capital is found to play an important role...but it is little developed in Portugal.

reforms.description: The Portuguese government reorganized responsibilities in higher education and scientific research by creating a separate Ministry of Science and Higher Education, aiming to strengthen links between universities and enterprises.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving the alignment of university curricula with employer needs, the reform is expected to enhance the quality of graduates and their employability, thus supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The new structure was applied from the year 2003-04.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the governance of higher education, which is crucial for aligning education with labor market needs and enhancing the overall quality of education in Portugal.
reforms.source_quote: The responsibilities of the Ministry of Education were split, with university education and scientific research being regrouped in a Ministry of Science and Higher Education.

reforms.description: Portugal has introduced new instruments to strengthen the links between business and research institutions, supporting the establishment of new technology-based firms and enhancing R&D activities in enterprises.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering collaboration between businesses and research institutions, the reform aims to enhance innovation capacity and productivity in the private sector.
reforms.status_evidence: Measures have been taken recently to spur innovation in enterprises and R&D activities.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in policy aimed at enhancing the innovation ecosystem by directly linking businesses with research institutions, which is crucial for economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: Measures have been taken recently to spur innovation in enterprises and R&D activities.

reforms.description: A new programme for applied business research and development (IDEIA) has been launched to support partnerships between enterprises and national science organisations, focusing on the creation of new products, processes, or services.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This programme aims to enhance applied research capabilities in businesses, leading to innovation and improved competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: The IDEIA programme supports partnerships between enterprises and the national science organisations.
reforms.importance_rationale: The IDEIA programme represents a major initiative to enhance applied research in the private sector, which is essential for driving innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: The new programme for applied business research and development (IDEIA) supports partnerships between enterprises and the national science organisations.

reforms.description: Portugal introduced various venture capital measures starting in 2002, including a new law to simplify rules and regulations for the sector, tax incentives, and lower capital requirements for venture funds and companies.
reforms.package_name: Programme to Stimulate Growth and Productivity
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These measures aim to enhance private venture activity, thereby increasing investment in innovative startups and contributing to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Various venture capital measures have been introduced, starting in 2002.
reforms.importance_rationale: The introduction of venture capital measures represents a significant effort to stimulate private investment and support the growth of innovative firms, which is crucial for enhancing productivity.
reforms.source_quote: Various venture capital measures have been introduced, starting in 2002, in the context of the Programme to stimulate growth and productivity.

reforms.description: The Novas Empresas de Suporte Tecnológico (NEST) programme provides support to the creation of technology-based companies with venture capital financing, aimed at companies critically dependent on high-technology development.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Supports the establishment of high-tech firms, fostering innovation and potential economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme provides support to technology-based companies.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme is significant in promoting the growth of technology-based firms, which are crucial for innovation and economic development.
reforms.source_quote: The Novas Empresas de Suporte Tecnológico (NEST) programme provides support to the creation of technology-based companies with venture capital financing.

reforms.description: The QUADROS programme co-finances costs associated with hiring graduates in areas linked to innovation and management, supporting firms in their modernization efforts.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances the skills of the workforce in innovation-related fields, which can lead to increased productivity and competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme co-finances costs associated with hiring graduates.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme is significant in addressing the skills gap in innovation and management, which is essential for firm modernization.
reforms.source_quote: The QUADROS programme co-finances current cost associated with hiring graduates in marketing, engineering, technology and other areas linked to innovation and management.

reforms.description: The new enterprises for technological support programme (NEST) aims to assist in the creation of technology-based enterprises located in technology centres or parks by facilitating access to financing from public risk capital companies or funds.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By supporting the establishment of technology-based enterprises, the programme is expected to enhance innovation and economic growth through the development of new technologies and services.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme is focused on helping the creation of technology-based enterprises.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme represents a significant effort to foster innovation and entrepreneurship in technology sectors, which is crucial for economic development.
reforms.source_quote: In particular, the new enterprises for technological support programme (NEST) is focused on helping the creation of technology-based enterprises located in technology centres or parks.

reforms.description: A comprehensive reform of the health care system was undertaken in 2002, aiming to create a 'big bang' in the health sector by separating functions of regulation, financing, and provision of health care, and introducing new models of financing and management.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to improve efficiency and health outcomes in the health care system, which can lead to better health status and productivity in the population.
reforms.status_evidence: New legislation has been approved and is in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change in the health care system, aiming for irreversible improvements in efficiency and health outcomes, which are critical for the economy.
reforms.source_quote: A comprehensive reform of the health care system was undertaken in 2002... New legislation has been approved separating functions of regulation, financing and provision of health care.

reforms.description: An in-depth reform of the hospital sector was launched in 2002, introducing new forms of management to improve efficiency and quality of service, including the transformation of public hospitals into public corporations.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reform aims to enhance hospital management and efficiency, potentially leading to better health outcomes and reduced costs in the long run.
reforms.status_evidence: The transformation of public hospitals into public corporations started to operate in 2003.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in the management of public hospitals, aiming to improve efficiency and service quality across the healthcare system.
reforms.source_quote: An in-depth reform of the hospital sector was launched in 2002, introducing new forms of management, so as to improve efficiency and quality of service.
